title: Napoli eterna canzone
writer: Natale Montillo (screenplay), Silvio Siano (screenplay), Natale Montillo (story)
actors: Paolo Carlini, Anna Di Lorenzo, Margabella, Franca Marzi
plot: In Naples, the young composer Roberto is in love with Stella and would like to marry her, but the girl's mother is opposed, wanting to find for her daughter a better partner.
